title: Intel shares XeSS 3.0 SDK for game devs with 3x and 4x MFG modes but it still hasn't followed through on its open-source promise
summary: Intel has released the XeSS 3.0 SDK for game developers, but it's closed-source. The SDK supports 3x and 4x MFG modes, offering improved graphics capabilities. This move comes despite Intel's initial promise to make XeSS open-source.
insight: Intel's closed-source SDK contradicts its initial open-source promise.

title: How To Optimize Your PC s Airflow Using Positive vs. Negative Pressure
summary: Optimizing PC airflow using positive vs. negative pressure can significantly improve performance, reduce temperatures, and enhance overall system longevity.
insight: Airflow configuration has a greater impact than cooler upgrades on PC performance.

title: Intel Nova Lake CPU teaser lists official support for speedy DDR5-8000 RAM B960 mini-PC s upgraded power system signals Nova Lake s higher power demands
summary: ECS has showcased its revamped Liva P300 mini-PC for Intel's Nova Lake processors, featuring speedy DDR5-8000 RAM and an upgraded power system, indicating higher power demands from the upcoming CPUs.
insight: Nova Lake processors require more power than predecessors.

title: SK hynix introduces turbocharged LPDDR6, 33% faster and 20% more power efficient than LPDDR5X 16Gb chips deliver 10.7 Gbps, uses 10nm node
summary: SK Hynix has developed LPDDR6 memory modules operating at 10.7Gbps using 10nm-class process node, offering 33% faster speeds and 20% more power efficiency compared to LPDDR5X 16Gb chips.
insight: Faster, more power-efficient memory enables improved mobile device performance.

title: Oracle and OpenAI's Abilene expansion saga detailed: 600MW expansion gets scrapped, as larger 4.5GW agreement remains on track
summary: Oracle and OpenAI scrapped their 600MW expansion plans for Abilene campus, focusing on larger 4.5GW agreement.
insight: Renewed focus on massive 4.5GW project signals long-term tech investment commitment.

title: Dynamic MFG comes to RTX 50-series GPUs to push monitor refresh rates to the max more flexible mode with 5x and 6x multipliers arrives March 31
summary: Dynamic Multi Frame Generation (MFG) arrives March 31 with 5X and 6X modes.
insight: Higher refresh rates for smoother gaming experiences on RTX 50-series GPUs.

title: Nvidia reportedly building its own AI agent to compete with OpenClaw, report claims NemoClaw will supposedly be open source and designed for enterprise use
summary: Nvidia is reportedly developing its own open-source AI agent, NemoClaw, for enterprise use.
insight: Nvidia's entry shakes up AI market, increasing competition for OpenClaw

title: Future Games Show Spring Showcase announced for GDC Baldur's Gate 3 and LEGO Batman actors to host
summary: The Future Games Show Spring Showcase will be broadcast on March 12, featuring 40 games across multiple platforms. The event will take place during GDC, starting at 4 pm ET (1 pm PT). Baldur's Gate 3 and LEGO Batman actors will host the showcase.
insight: Major game announcements expected during prominent gaming convention broadcast

title: Apple MacBook Neo review: a budget-priced game-changer
summary: The Apple MacBook Neo offers premium features at an affordable price, with some minor compromises.
insight: Budget-friendliness revolutionizes the Apple laptop market space.

title: Laptop prices expected to soar by around 40% as AI crunch takes hold analyst says rising mainstream models priced at $900 could hit more than $1,200 due to rising memory, storage, and CPU costs
summary: TrendForce predicts midrange laptops will see a 40% price increase due to rising costs of memory, storage, and CPUs.
insight: Rising AI demand drives up laptop component costs significantly.

title: Get an X870 Motherboard, 32GB of RAM, a 1050W Power supply, and a Montech King 95 Pro case for only $774 save over $220 on this 4-item combo from Newegg
summary: Get a comprehensive AM5 build starter kit from Newegg featuring a MSI motherboard, 32GB of RAM, 1050W power supply, and a Montech case for $774, saving $220.
insight: Affordable AM5 build starter kit available at Newegg

title: Get 32GB of Corsair Vengeance DDR5 for $163 when bundled with AMD's new 9850X3D and an X870E-E motherboard save $236 on the heart of your new AM5 PC
summary: Newegg offers a bundle deal for AMD 9850X3D, RAM, and motherboard. The bundle includes 32GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5 RAM for $163. This saves customers $236 compared to individual purchases.
insight: Significant savings on key components for a new AM5 PC build.

title: Unpowered SSD data retention test shows promising results after six years results show no data corruption on USB sticks, challenging conventional wisdom
summary: A six-year unpowered data retention test on flash drives shows no corruption, challenging traditional assumptions about data longevity.
insight: Flash drives retain data longer than previously thought without power.

title: $500,000 gold RTX 5090 is now worth $830,000 thanks to rocketing commodity prices Asus ROG Astral RTX 5090 Real Gold Edition was actually a savvy investment, worth over 50% more than at inception
summary: The Asus ROG Astral RTX 5090 Real Gold Edition has seen significant value growth, increasing from $500,000 to $830,000 due to rising commodity prices. This unique, one-off gold-plated graphics card has proven to be a lucrative investment opportunity. Its scrap value has increased by over 50% since inception.
insight: Rising commodity prices can transform rare tech items into valuable investments.

title: RPCS3 Emulator boasts over 1500 FPS on the Minecraft title screen platform hails performance landmark, one frame rendered every 0.00064 seconds
summary: The RPCS3 emulator team achieved a remarkable 1500 FPS on Minecraft, a significant performance milestone. This achievement showcases the team's dedication to optimization, pushing the emulator's capabilities to new heights. However, many games still remain unplayable without modern hardware.
insight: Optimization breakthroughs pave way for smoother emulation experiences.

title: AMD Ryzen AI Embedded P100 series expands with up to 12 Zen 5 cores, 80 TOPS of AI performance
summary: AMD expanded its Ryzen AI Embedded P100 series with higher-core SKUs, integrating up to 12 Zen 5 CPU cores and RDNA 3.5 graphics for enhanced AI performance. The new SoCs deliver up to 80 TOPS of combined AI performance and support unified CPU-GPU memory. This expansion targets commercial and industrial applications.
insight: Enhanced AI performance for commercial and industrial edge computing

title: Texas Instruments MSPM0G5187 and AM13Ex MCUs integrate TinyEngine NPU for Edge AI applications
summary: Texas Instruments has introduced the MSPM0G5187 and AM13Ex MCU families with integrated TinyEngine NPU, enabling low-latency Edge AI applications with up to 90 times lower latency and 120 times lower energy utilization.
insight: Edge AI inference becomes accessible and efficient on resource-constrained devices.

title: NXP i.MX 937 cost-effective Cortex-A55/M7/M33 MPU is a drop-in replacement for NXP i.MX 95 SoC family
summary: The NXP i.MX 937 MPU offers a balance between performance and cost, featuring a 1.4 GHz quad-core Cortex-A55, a dedicated Cortex-M7 for real-time tasks, and a Cortex-M33 for system management. It includes support for LPDDR4x or LPDDR5 memory, a Mali G310 GPU, and a 2 eTOPS NPU for ML acceleration. This makes it a drop-in replacement for the NXP i.MX 95 SoC family.
insight: Cost-effective performance for HMI and Edge AI applications fills gap.

title: Raspberry Pi CM0-based industrial AI camera features motorized auto-focus system, 12-pin Ethernet/RS-232/DO aviation connector
summary: EDATEC launched the ED-AIC1000, a compact industrial AI camera built around the Raspberry Pi CM0, integrating a 1.3 MP global-shutter camera, motorized autofocus, and 12-pin industrial connector for various industrial automation applications.
insight: Boosts industrial automation efficiency with AI-powered vision capabilities.

title: BeagleBadge A Linux-powered 4.2-inch ePaper badge based on TI Sitara AM62L32 SoC
summary: BeagleBoard.org Foundation introduces the BeagleBadge, a Linux-powered badge with a 4.2-inch ePaper display and various features like WiFi 6 and LoRa connectivity. It is quite feature-rich for a badge, making it suitable for various applications such as IoT projects and maker communities. The badge is based on the Texas Instruments Sitara AM62L32 SoC, a dual-core Cortex-A53 processor.
insight: Rapid prototyping and development of IoT projects made easy with Linux badge

title: NXP i.MX 93W wireless MPU SiP pairs dual-core Arm Cortex-A55 processor with NXP iW610 WiFi 6, Bluetooth LE, and 805.15.4 radio
summary: NXP i.MX 93W is a wireless MPU SiP combining a dual-core Cortex-A55 processor with WiFi 6, Bluetooth, and 802.15.4 radios in a single chip. This reduces PCB area, simplifies design, and speeds up time-to-market. The package includes all necessary external radio components.
insight: Simplified wireless design accelerates IoT and embedded systems development

title: Intel launches Core Series 2 and intros healthcare edge suite
summary: Intel launches its Core Series 2, a follow-up to its previous edge computing offerings. The company also introduces a healthcare edge suite, highlighting its commitment to industrial edge computing. This marks a significant move in the edge computing market.
insight: Intel's edge industrial history gives it a competitive edge over Qualcomm.

title: TI plunks mmWave radar sensing onto Jetson Thor
summary: Texas Instruments (TI) is integrating mmWave radar sensing into Nvidia's Jetson Thor chip using the Holoscan Sensor Bridge, enabling advanced robotics capabilities.
insight: Enhanced robotics navigation and safety through advanced sensing capabilities.

title: Nvidia GDC 2026 roundup: More path-traced games, DLSS 4.5 debut titles, and RTX mega foliage
summary: Nvidia announced an early opt-in beta for DLSS 6x multi-frame generation and dynamic mode starting March 31, two features previously scheduled for an April launch. This beta is available for users with high-refresh-rate monitors. The exact duration of the beta period is unclear.
insight: Early access to improved DLSS tech for high-refresh-rate gamers.

title: Laptops could soon cost 40% more, and you already know why
summary: Laptops may cost 40% more due to CPU manufacturing challenges. TrendForce analysis suggests a significant price increase in the portable PC market. This could impact consumer purchasing decisions and industry trends.
insight: Supply chain constraints exacerbate laptop pricing uncertainty

title: Apple now assembles a quarter of iPhones in India, signaling major supply chain shift
summary: Apple now assembles a quarter of iPhones in India, shifting supply chain dynamics due to US tariffs on Chinese electronics.
insight: US-China trade tensions force Apple to diversify global production bases.

title: Arduino Ventuno Q marks Qualcomm's entry into offline AI and robotics
summary: Qualcomm's Ventuno Q aims to address concerns from the Arduino community after acquisition.
insight: Qualcomm's entry into offline AI and robotics may disrupt the market.

title: Hackers are selling a critical Windows zero-day exploit for $220,000 on the dark web
summary: A Windows zero-day exploit is being sold on the dark web for $220,000, targeting elevation of privilege vulnerabilities in Windows 10 and 11.
insight: Critical Windows vulnerability exposes users to severe data breaches and attacks.

title: Early reviews say the MacBook Neo redefines the budget laptop
summary: The MacBook Neo offers premium features at an affordable $599 price. Reviewers praise its aluminum build, display, and performance. The laptop's battery life exceeds expectations for its budget category.
insight: Redefining budget laptops without sacrificing key premium features

title: Electric air taxis will enter US skies this summer under FAA pilot
summary: The US Department of Transportation has launched an 8-project pilot program for electric air taxis, allowing limited flight authorization for unapproved aircraft designs. The three-year initiative aims to facilitate testing and certification of passenger and cargo aircraft. The program will take place in multiple states across the US.
insight: Accelerating electric air taxi adoption with safe experimental testing.

title: Sonos unveils two new speakers: the portable Play and cheaper Era 100 SL
summary: Sonos has introduced the portable Play speaker and Era 100 SL. The Play is a battery-powered speaker between the Roam 2 and Move 2. It offers improved sound quality for on-the-go use.
insight: Sonos expands its portable speaker lineup with the battery-powered Play

title: Students are learning to write for AI detectors, not for humans
summary: Students are learning to write for AI detectors, not for humans, as AI-powered tools increasingly flag essays as AI-written.
insight: Over-reliance on AI detection tools undermines human writing skills development.

title: Steam delivered 100 exabytes of data last year, about 274 petabytes per day
summary: Valve's Steam storefront delivered 100 exabytes of data, with 80 exabytes going to users in 2024, primarily through game installs and updates.
insight: Massive data delivery highlights the scale of modern gaming ecosystems.

title: Intel launches Bartlett Lake CPUs with all P-cores for embedded applications
summary: Intel launches the Bartlett Lake CPU family with 11 SKUs, featuring all-P-core designs for improved performance and reduced overhead in embedded applications.
insight: Simplified scheduling and reduced overhead for edge computing and embedded systems.

title: Oversight Board urges Meta to toughen rules on AI-generated content and deepfakes
summary: The Oversight Board urges Meta to improve rules on AI-generated content, specifically deepfakes, after a fake AI-generated video was shared on Meta platforms, posing as a news source.
insight: Misinformation spreads quickly through AI-generated content on social media platforms.

title: Apple could expand lineup to offer "Ultra" versions of iPhone, MacBook, and AirPods
summary: Apple may release 'Ultra' versions of iPhone, MacBook, and AirPods, positioning them above Pro models.
insight: Enhanced features justify higher price points for premium products

title: One in four CEOs say AI is a bubble but will continue investing
summary: One in four CEOs believe AI is a bubble, but plan to continue investing.
insight: Perceived AI bubble risk won't deter business investment decisions.

title: Solar-powered laptops are back, and this one is built for the field
summary: The RG14-P is a solar-powered laptop with a reinforced metal chassis, designed for field use.
insight: Rugged design enables reliable computing in harsh, remote environments worldwide.

title: Stop the Slop: 8 Tools That Clean Up Windows 11
summary: Windows 11 users can regain control with free tools that clean up the OS, disabling AI features and ads, and reducing telemetry. These popular tools provide more control over the operating system. They can help streamline the user experience.
insight: Regaining control over Windows 11 is essential for user autonomy.
